creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
wxs         2009-03-31 20:06:07 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    .                    MOVED 
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-Getopt-Mixed Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Bring devel/p5-Getopt-Mixed back, this time without EXPIRATION_DATE.
  While the port is abandoned upstream it does still work and mail/t-prot
  is broken without it.  Fixing mail/t-prot does not look like it will
  ever happen so we should keep Getopt::Mixed around and discourage it's
  use with DEPRECATED.
  
  PR:             ports/132922
  Submitted by:   rollingbits@gmail.com
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1842    +1 -2      ports/MOVED
  1.3447    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.7       +26 -0     ports/devel/p5-Getopt-Mixed/Makefile (new)
  1.6       +3 -0      ports/devel/p5-Getopt-Mixed/distinfo (new)
  1.3       +4 -0      ports/devel/p5-Getopt-Mixed/pkg-descr (new)
  1.6       +6 -0      ports/devel/p5-Getopt-Mixed/pkg-plist (new)
